title: ProtocolLab HTTP/2 Comparison Topology Contract Verification
scope: Verify the public HTTP/2 v2 comparison load identity and requested-versus-observed topology boundary without claiming executor or implementation support.
verification_method: SpecTrace review, v2 schema validation, valid and invalid fixture validation, suite/profile reference review, and repository-health checks.
procedure: Validate that http2-comparison requests 16 connections, 128 global in-flight operations, an 8-stream per-connection configured cap, and balanced-round-robin distribution.
Confirm global concurrency does not exceed configured aggregate stream capacity.
Confirm required topology evidence distinguishes configured values from observed active connections, streams, peer limits, clamping, and redistribution.
Confirm the comparison suite selects only the initially supported deterministic plaintext and JSON workloads.
expected_result: The HTTP/2 comparison contract has one exact schedulable requested topology and requires distinct observed-topology evidence before results can be compared.
